/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/AboutUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/Desktop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/GUIApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/SettingsUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/TaskManagerUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/Taskbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/TextureLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/UIConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/UIManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/main.cpp.o -o csopesy_gui  libimgui.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
